mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
SELECT provider FROM user_social WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY provider
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_social WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND provider = #{provider}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET status = 'DELETED', email = NULL, login_id = NULL, phone = NULL, phone_verified = 0, password = NULL, password_enabled = 0, name = '탈퇴한 사용자', email_verified = 0, deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, NOW()), status_changed_at = NOW(), status_changed_by = NULL, blocked_reason = NULL, blocked_until = NULL WHERE id = #{userId} AND status <> 'DELETED'
UPDATE email_verification SET email = CONCAT('deleted-', id, '@invalid.local'), used = 1, used_at = COALESCE(used_at, NOW()), expired_at = LEAST(expired_at, NOW()) WHERE user_id = #{userId}

UPDATE user_profile SET desired_job = NULL, desired_industry = NULL, education = NULL, career = NULL, projects = NULL, skills = NULL, certificates = NULL, languages = NULL, portfolio_links = NULL, resume_text = NULL, self_intro = NULL, preferences = NULL, deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, NOW()), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}

UPDATE user_profile_version SET desired_job = NULL, desired_industry = NULL, education = NULL, career = NULL, projects = NULL, skills = NULL, certificates = NULL, languages = NULL, portfolio_links = NULL, resume_text = NULL, self_intro = NULL, preferences = NULL, deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, NOW()) WHERE user_id = #{userId}

UPDATE profile_ai_analysis SET summary = NULL, strengths = JSON_ARRAY(), gaps = JSON_ARRAY(), recommendations = JSON_ARRAY(), extracted_skills = JSON_ARRAY(), criteria = JSON_ARRAY(), job_family = NULL, completeness_score = NULL, ai_score = NULL, quality_warnings = JSON_ARRAY(), status = 'DELETED', deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, NOW()), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}

UPDATE user_resume_detail SET education_json = NULL, career_json = NULL, certificate_json = NULL, language_json = NULL, award_json = NULL, activity_json = NULL, skill_json = NULL, portfolio_json = NULL, desired_condition_json = NULL, deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, NOW()), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}

UPDATE correction_request SET original_text = '', improved_text = NULL, result_json = NULL, source_snapshot = NULL, admin_memo = NULL, status = 'DELETED', deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, NOW()) WHERE user_id = #{userId}

UPDATE user_nickname_profile SET nickname = CONCAT('deleted-', LEFT(SHA2(CONCAT('careertuner-deleted-profile:', id), 256), 22)), avatar_file_id = NULL, bio = NULL, is_default = 0, status = 'HIDDEN' WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_chat_profile SET nickname = '탈퇴한 사용자', avatar_url = NULL, description = NULL, is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE conversation_member_profile SET nickname_profile_id = NULL, anonymous = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}

UPDATE collaboration_conversation_member SET status = 'LEFT', room_nickname = NULL, room_profile_file_id = NULL, muted = 1, left_at = COALESCE(left_at, NOW()) WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

UPDATE collaboration_friend_request SET status = 'CANCELED', responded_at = COALESCE(responded_at, NOW()), updated_at = NOW() WHERE (requester_id = #{userId} OR receiver_id = #{userId}) AND status = 'PENDING'

UPDATE collaboration_conversation_invite SET status = 'CANCELED', responded_at = COALESCE(responded_at, NOW()), updated_at = NOW() WHERE (inviter_id = #{userId} OR invitee_id = #{userId}) AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE collaboration_friendship SET deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, NOW()) WHERE (user_id = #{userId} OR friend_user_id = #{userId}) AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE collaboration_conversation_permission SET deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, NOW()) WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE collaboration_conversation_invite_allow SET deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, NOW()) WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE notification SET deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, NOW()) WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE post_subscription SET deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, NOW()) WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE comment_subscription SET deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, NOW()) WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE post_scrap SET deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, NOW()) WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE community_post post JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT post_id FROM post_scrap WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND post_id IS NOT NULL) affected ON affected.post_id = post.id SET post.scrap_count = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_scrap scrap WHERE scrap.post_id = post.id AND scrap.deleted_at IS NULL )
UPDATE post_reaction SET deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, NOW()) WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE community_post post JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT post_id FROM post_reaction WHERE user_id = #{userId}) affected ON affected.post_id = post.id SET post.like_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_reaction r WHERE r.post_id = post.id AND r.reaction_type = 'LIKE' AND r.deleted_at IS NULL), post.dislike_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_reaction r WHERE r.post_id = post.id AND r.reaction_type = 'DISLIKE' AND r.deleted_at IS NULL), post.recommend_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_reaction r WHERE r.post_id = post.id AND r.reaction_type = 'RECOMMEND' AND r.deleted_at IS NULL), post.disrecommend_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_reaction r WHERE r.post_id = post.id AND r.reaction_type = 'DISRECOMMEND' AND r.deleted_at IS NULL), post.bookmark_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_reaction r WHERE r.post_id = post.id AND r.reaction_type = 'BOOKMARK' AND r.deleted_at IS NULL)
UPDATE comment_reaction SET deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, NOW()) WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE community_comment comment JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT comment_id FROM comment_reaction WHERE user_id = #{userId}) affected ON affected.comment_id = comment.id SET comment.like_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_reaction r WHERE r.comment_id = comment.id AND r.reaction_type = 'LIKE' AND r.deleted_at IS NULL), comment.dislike_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_reaction r WHERE r.comment_id = comment.id AND r.reaction_type = 'DISLIKE' AND r.deleted_at IS NULL), comment.recommend_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_reaction r WHERE r.comment_id = comment.id AND r.reaction_type = 'RECOMMEND' AND r.deleted_at IS NULL), comment.disrecommend_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_reaction r WHERE r.comment_id = comment.id AND r.reaction_type = 'DISRECOMMEND' AND r.deleted_at IS NULL)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_resume_detail WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_resume_detail ( user_id, education_json, career_json, certificate_json, language_json, award_json, activity_json, skill_json, portfolio_json, desired_condition_json ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{educationJson}, #{careerJson}, #{certificateJson}, #{languageJson}, #{awardJson}, #{activityJson}, #{skillJson}, #{portfolioJson}, #{desiredConditionJson} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE education_json = VALUES(education_json), career_json = VALUES(career_json), certificate_json = VALUES(certificate_json), language_json = VALUES(language_json), award_json = VALUES(award_json), activity_json = VALUES(activity_json), skill_json = VALUES(skill_json), portfolio_json = VALUES(portfolio_json), desired_condition_json = VALUES(desired_condition_json), deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW()
